title: Viking Weaponary
description: Changes all melee weapons to viking styled ones. Made for RP purposes mostly
body:
# Resource Pack that turns melee weapons into Viking themed ones

### Changes
**Wooden Sword** into a **training sword**

**Stone Sword** into a short **Seax Sword**

**Golden Sword** into **Claymore**

**Iron Sword** into a **Boarding Sword** that in my opinion _looks like classic viking sword_

**Diamond Sword** into a **Ulfberht Sword** because it was a symbol of _high craftsmanship_ and _high durability_ 

**Netherite Sword** into the **Skofnung Sword** as it was a _legendary blade of King Hrólf Kraki_, famed for its _exceptional sharpness_ and _mystical powers_. It was considered one of the _most powerful swords in Norse sagas_

**Trident** into a **Thor's Hammer** for it performing as one with enchantments

**Mace** is _still a mace_ but now its just **realistic** and probably _the most laggy_ out of all

**Shield** turns into a **circular shield**

Report mistakes on [GitHub](https://github.com/XtonevV/Viking-Armory/discussions/categories/bug-tracker-viking-weaponary)

# THIS RESOURCE PACK REQUIRES [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) TO WORK CORRECTLY
![EFT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d4608f18fc00ca5e9da67f3213c436a24b0d5d8.png)
![EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a07d72613d8c20b47c6f49efcab238e870e9efa.png)
![CIT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a66b8f70dfe62dc740e84ca43f9f6377aa4ff8_0.webp)

## [CIT RESEWN](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) is also required for pre 26.1 versions
